queries.question: Which content curation technique is shared by all streaming services?
queries.sql: SELECT Content_Curating_Techniques.technique  from Streaming_Services_Content_Curating_Techniques join Content_Curating_Techniques on Streaming_Services_Content_Curating_Techniques.content_curating_technique_id = Content_Curating_Techniques.id join Streaming_Services on Streaming_Services_Content_Curating_Techniques.streaming_service_id = Streaming_Services.service_id   GROUP BY Streaming_Services_Content_Curating_Techniques.content_curating_technique_id HAVING COUNT(DISTINCT Streaming_Services_Content_Curating_Techniques.streaming_service_id) = (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM  Streaming_Services)

queries.question: For each streaming service, what are the associated content curation techniques?
queries.sql: select streaming_services.name , content_curating_techniques.technique from Streaming_Services_Content_Curating_Techniques join Content_Curating_Techniques on Streaming_Services_Content_Curating_Techniques.content_curating_technique_id = Content_Curating_Techniques.id join Streaming_Services on Streaming_Services_Content_Curating_Techniques.streaming_service_id = Streaming_Services.service_id
queries.sparql:
PREFIX : <http://ambrosia.example.org/streamingservice#>
PREFIX p: <http://ambrosia.example.org/streamingservice/prop#>
PREFIX xsd: <http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema#>
SELECT ?name ?technique WHERE {
  ?streaming_services_content_curating_techniques a :Streaming_Services_Content_Curating_Techniques .
  ?content_curating_techniques a :Content_Curating_Techniques .
  ?streaming_services_content_curating_techniques p:hasContent_Curating_Techniques ?content_curating_techniques .
  ?streaming_services a :Streaming_Services .
  ?streaming_services_content_curating_techniques p:hasStreaming_Services ?streaming_services .
  ?streaming_services p:name ?name .
  ?content_curating_techniques p:technique ?technique .
}

ambiguous_dsl.question: What content curation techniques are utilized by each streaming service?
